title: gymnadenia conopsea var. comigera
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea var. comigera, also known as the summer lady's tresses, is a rare and unique variety of orchid native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been known to aid in the treatment of various health issues. The summer lady's tresses is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as a natural antiseptic. Gymnadenia conopsea var. comigera is typically harvested in the summer months and can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal properties.
